type_SystemContract.name: SystemContract
type_SystemContract.description: System hardware, software and nrd(non returnable disk) contract details

fields.name: softwareContractStartDate
fields.description: Software contract start date.

fields.name: hardwareContractStartDate
fields.description: Hardware contract start date.

fields.name: nrdContractStartDate
fields.description: NRD (non returnable disk) contract start date.

fields.name: expiryDate
fields.description: Earliest contract expiration date.

fields.name: softwareContractEndDate
fields.description: Software contract end date.

fields.name: hardwareContractEndDate
fields.description: Hardware contract end date.

fields.name: nrdContractEndDate
fields.description: NRD (non returnable disk) contract end date.

fields.name: overallContractEndDate
fields.description: Overall contract end date.

fields.name: softwareContractId
fields.description: Software contract id.

fields.name: hardwareContractId
fields.description: Hardware contract id.

fields.name: nrdContractId
fields.description: NRD (non returnable disk) contract id.

fields.name: isContractActive
fields.description: Contract status of a system. Set to true if one of the NRD, SW & HW contracts are active otherwise false.

fields.name: hardwareServiceLevel
fields.description: The level of hardware support purchased on a system by the customer.

fields.name: hardwareWarrantyEndDate
fields.description: The date when the hardware warranty of the NetApp product expires

fields.name: hardwareWarrantyStartDate
fields.description: The date when the hardware warranty of the NetApp product begins.

type_LifecycleEvent.name: LifecycleEvent
type_LifecycleEvent.description: A lifecycle event that has been identified for your system, representing an upcoming milestone that may require attention such as a contract expiry, a capacity threshold crossing, or an end-of-support-life date.

fields.name: workflowCategory
fields.description: The high-level workflow category this event belongs to, such as Renewal, Capacity, or Tech Refresh.

fields.name: typeCode
fields.description: The specific type of lifecycle event identified for your system.

fields.name: typeName
fields.description: A human-readable name for this lifecycle event type.

fields.name: criticalityCode
fields.description: The urgency level of this event, indicating how soon action is recommended.

fields.name: daysToEvent
fields.description: The estimated number of days until this lifecycle event is expected to occur. A value of 0 indicates the event is imminent or already underway.

fields.name: talkingPoint
fields.description: A concise summary explaining why this lifecycle event was identified for your system.

fields.name: actions
fields.description: The list of recommended actions you can take to address this lifecycle event, ranked by priority.

type_Recommendation.name: Recommendation
type_Recommendation.description: Key recommendation containing matched recommendation data with scoring and categorization

fields.name: recommendation
fields.description: Actionable recommendation text with specific technical guidance and instructions

fields.name: rank
fields.description: Priority ranking within category where lower values indicate higher priority

fields.name: category
fields.description: Primary recommendation category for system health analysis and optimization

fields.name: subCategory
fields.description: Specific recommendation subcategory identifiers representing distinct system health and optimization focus areas (such as configuration, versioning, support status, and best practices) that enable precise recommendation targeting and retrieval within broader assessment categories.

fields.name: score
fields.description: System health percentage (0-100) where 100 indicates optimal performance and 0 indicates critical issues, used for threshold-based recommendation matching. Example: score 75 matches thresholds 0-79.

type_RecommendationCategory.name: RecommendationCategory
type_RecommendationCategory.description: Primary recommendation category for system health analysis and optimization

enumValues.name: AUTO_SUPPORT
enumValues.description: AutoSupport system configuration, connectivity, and data transmission settings

enumValues.name: SUPPORT_AND_ENTITLEMENTS
enumValues.description: Support contract status, entitlements, and end-of-support lifecycle management

enumValues.name: CONFIG
enumValues.description: System configuration optimization for high availability and operational efficiency

enumValues.name: VERSION
enumValues.description: Software version upgrades including ONTAP, firmware, and system components

enumValues.name: BEST_PRACTICES
enumValues.description: Best practices for system health and risk mitigation

type_SalesTerritoryHierarchy.name: SalesTerritoryHierarchy
type_SalesTerritoryHierarchy.description: Levels in which sales territory hierarchy is segregated at NetApp.

fields.name: worldwide
fields.description: Level one of the sales territory hierarchy.

fields.name: geo
fields.description: Level two of the sales territory hierarchy.

fields.name: multiArea
fields.description: Level three of the sales territory hierarchy.

fields.name: area
fields.description: Level four of the sales territory hierarchy.

fields.name: multiRegion
fields.description: Level Five of the sales territory hierarchy.

fields.name: region
fields.description: Level six of the sales territory hierarchy.

fields.name: district
fields.description: Level seven of the sales territory hierarchy.

fields.name: territory
fields.description: A geographical area defined on the basis of geography, sales potential, history, or a combination of factors for which an individual salesperson or sales team holds responsibility.

type_SystemContactPerson.name: SystemContactPerson
type_SystemContactPerson.description: Contact information for the person you can reach out to.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Contact person's name.

fields.name: emailAddress
fields.description: Contact person's email address.

fields.name: managerEmailAddress
fields.description: The email address of contact person's manager.

fields.name: firstName
fields.description: Contact first name

fields.name: lastName
fields.description: Contact last name.

fields.name: phone
fields.description: Contact number.

fields.name: email
fields.description: Contact email address.

type_EnergyConsumptionMetrics.name: EnergyConsumptionMetrics
type_EnergyConsumptionMetrics.description: Energy consumption details of a FAS or AFF ONTAP system from AutoSupport and data published by NetApp product teams.

fields.name: actualEnergyConsumptions
fields.description: Energy consumption details generated using the AutoSupport data.

fields.name: projectedEnergyConsumption
fields.description: Energy consumption details generated using the AutoSupport data and data published by hardware product teams in NetApp based on experimental analysis.

fields.name: publishedPowerConsumption
fields.description: Power consumption values generated using the data published by hardware product teams in NetApp based on experimental analysis.

fields.name: forecastedEnergyConsumptions
fields.description: Energy consumption details of a hardware component generated using AI model.

type_SustainabilityScore.name: SustainabilityScore
type_SustainabilityScore.description: Scoring mechanism for energy consumption based on ideal weightage set across various parameters that impact the energy usage. Scores are computed for systems that send AutoSupport.

fields.name: scorePercentage
fields.description: Sustainability score as a percentage computed on a variety of factors such as a hardware component's configuration, installed location, and other factors that impact power consumption efficiency and efficient monitoring.

fields.name: percentageChange
fields.description: Percentage change in score when compared to the previous week. Negative value if the score decreases.

fields.name: changeFactors
fields.description: List of factors that impacted change in score percentage when compared to the previous week.

fields.name: generatedDate
fields.description: Date and time when the sustainability score was generated.

type_SystemDowntimeEvents.name: SystemDowntimeEvents
type_SystemDowntimeEvents.description: A list of system downtime events.

fields.name: totalCount
fields.description: Total number of downtime events matching the query.

fields.name: events
fields.description: List of downtime events.

type_SystemDowntimeEvent.name: SystemDowntimeEvent
type_SystemDowntimeEvent.description: A downtime event for a system, sourced from AutoSupport data.

fields.name: autoSupport
fields.description: AutoSupport details associated with the downtime event.

fields.name: category
fields.description: Category of the downtime event (e.g. Takeover).

fields.name: code
fields.description: Event code identifying the type of downtime event.

fields.name: emsDate
fields.description: Date and time when the EMS event occurred.

fields.name: summary
fields.description: Short summary describing the downtime event.

fields.name: outageSeconds
fields.description: Total duration of the outage in seconds.

type_ONTAPSystemCapacity.name: ONTAPSystemCapacity
type_ONTAPSystemCapacity.description: Capacity information of a customer, site, cluster, group or system for ONTAP

fields.name: logical
fields.description: Logical capacity

fields.name: physical
fields.description: Physical capacity

fields.name: efficiency
fields.description: Storage Efficiency

fields.name: lastAsupId
fields.description: The last ASUP ID for the system

fields.name: reportedOn
fields.description: The date when the last ASUP was generated

fields.name: allocatedKB
fields.description: Total size of aggregate in KB.

fields.name: lastAsupId
fields.description: The last ASUP ID for the system

fields.name: reportedOn
fields.description: The date when the last ASUP was generated

fields.name: logical
fields.description: Logical capacity details for the aggregate.

fields.name: physical
fields.description: Physical capacity details for the aggregate.

fields.name: efficiency
fields.description: Storage efficiency metrics for the aggregate.

type_AggregateCapacityForecast.name: AggregateCapacityForecast
type_AggregateCapacityForecast.description: A capacity forecast for a given aggregate, conveying last 12 months used/allocated and the next 12 months projection, then yearly to 5 years. Allocated: How much storage the aggregate can use, Used: How much storage the aggregate is using.

fields.name: trend
fields.description: The aggregate capacity forecasting data points.

fields.name: usableKiB
fields.description: The storage capacity that can be used

fields.name: availableKB
fields.description: Available volume in kilobytes

fields.name: sizeKB
fields.description: Total allocated volume capacity in kilobytes

fields.name: lastAsupId
fields.description: The last ASUP ID for the system

fields.name: reportedOn
fields.description: The date when the last ASUP was generated

fields.name: logical
fields.description: Logical volume capacity

fields.name: efficiency
fields.description: Efficiency details

fields.name: name
fields.description: Workload name

type_WorkloadSummary.name: WorkloadSummary
type_WorkloadSummary.description: This is a count of workloads for each of the possible values of the GroupBy field.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Value of the groupBy field

fields.name: systemCount
fields.description: Count of systems.

fields.name: volumeCount
fields.description: Count of volumes.

fields.name: totalCapacity
fields.description: Total capacity of the volumes. (Not supported on ASA R2 systems.)

fields.name: groupBy
fields.description: Applies groupBy field to workload group

fields.name: totalTieredKB
fields.description: The amount of data that has been moved to another tier.

fields.name: totalUnmonitoredKB
fields.description: The amount of data which are not monitored

fields.name: volumeCount
fields.description: Count of volumes.

fields.name: totalCapacity
fields.description: Total capacity of the volumes.

fields.name: caseId
fields.description: Identifier of the support case.

fields.name: created
fields.description: Timestamp when this case was created.

fields.name: lastUpdated
fields.description: Timestamp when this case was most recently modified

fields.name: closed
fields.description: Timestamp when this case was closed.

fields.name: priority
fields.description: Priority of the support case. Lower number is for higher priority.

fields.name: highestPriority
fields.description: Highest priority that can be assigned to the case.

fields.name: symptom
fields.description: Symptom of the case.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Status of the case.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Description of the support case.

fields.name: system
fields.description: Affected system.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Type of the support case.

fields.name: bugIds
fields.description: List of identifiers of the bugs associated with the support case.

fields.name: caseReceivedVia
fields.description: Method by which the support case was received.

fields.name: resolution
fields.description: Resolution of the support case.

fields.name: reporterContact
fields.description: Contact details of the person who created the case.

fields.name: rmaParts
fields.description: List of RMA (Return Merchandise Authorization) requests to return a product/part associated with the case.

fields.name: category
fields.description: Major functional area of the case.

fields.name: subCategory
fields.description: Technical sub-area within the major functional area.

fields.name: countByHighestPriority
fields.description: Case count by highest priority for a given duration.

fields.name: trendByHighestPriority
fields.description: Case trend by highest priority over time.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of the Authorized Support Partner (ASP) for the system.

fields.name: endDate
fields.description: Date until which the ASP Partner relationship remains valid.

type_DomesticParent.name: DomesticParent
type_DomesticParent.description: A geography-based grouping of a set of customer sites.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for a domestic parent.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Name of a domestic parent.

type_Site.name: Site
type_Site.description: Details of the physical location where the NetApp product resides

fields.name: id
fields.description: Site identifier of the system.

fields.name: cmatId
fields.description: The Site Customer Master Data ID (CMAT ID) is a unique identifier assigned to this specific location within NetApp's customer management system, enabling consistent identification of your site across all NetApp products and services.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Site name of the system.

fields.name: systems
fields.description: The storage systems that are currently part of this site.

fields.name: countryCode
fields.description: 2-character ISO Country code of the system site.

fields.name: postalCode
fields.description: Postal code of the system site.

fields.name: city
fields.description: City name of the system site.

fields.name: streetAddress
fields.description: List of street address lines for the system site.

fields.name: state
fields.description: State name of the system site.

fields.name: vmwareFlag
fields.description: Indicates whether VMware-related features are enabled on any system or cluster within the site.

fields.name: systemsWithCriticalPropensity
fields.description: Indicates the number of systems currently with critical propensity category at the customer's site.

fields.name: systemsWithHighPropensity
fields.description: Indicates the number of systems currently with high propensity category at the customer's site.

fields.name: operationalDate
fields.description: Date when the site became operational.

fields.name: ageInYears
fields.description: Indicates the duration for which the site has been operational. It is calculated as the difference between the current date and the system's operationalDate, divided by the average number of days in a year (365.25, to account for leap years), rounded down to the nearest integer.

fields.name: capacity
fields.description: Total storage capacity provisioned at a site. When querying a site, this value is aggregated across all customers associated with the site for which the user is entitled to see. When querying a system, this value is for the customer associated with that system at the site (not aggregated across multiple customers).

fields.name: monthlyCapacity
fields.description: Monthly capacity of customer site.

fields.name: carbonEmission
fields.description: Carbon emission factors of a site.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Customer identifier.

fields.name: cmatId
fields.description: The Customer Master Data ID (CMAT ID) is a unique identifier assigned to your organization in NetApp's customer management system, enabling consistent identification across all NetApp products and services.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Customer name.

fields.name: systems
fields.description: The storage systems that are currently part of this customer.

fields.name: sustainabilityScorePercentage
fields.description: Percentage value aggregated at customer, industry or overall NetApp level based on various factors such as hardware component's configuration, installed location and other energy factors that impacts the sustainability score.

fields.name: healthScore
fields.description: Health score calculated as the average percentage of all systems at customer, industry, and overall NetApp based on factors such as firmware recency, ONTAP version, add-on status, renewal status, and AutoSupport enabled/disabled state.

fields.name: quarterlyOntapFeatureUsageStats
fields.description: Quarterly ONTAP feature usage statistics aggregated at the customer level.

type_Nagp.name: Nagp
type_Nagp.description: NetApp Global Parent Account (NAGP) details of the system: NetApp defined top-level grouping that links companies, domestic parent, and sites in the NetApp Master. It represents the topmost level in the NetApp hierarchy and GTM hierarchy.

fields.name: id
fields.description: NetApp Global Parent Account identifier of the system.

fields.name: name
fields.description: NetApp Global Parent Account name of the system.

fields.name: autoSupportStatus
fields.description: Status of the AutoSupport mechanism on the system.

fields.name: isAutoSupportOnDemandEnabled
fields.description: AutoSupport on demand enabled.

fields.name: isAutoSupportOnDemandCapable
fields.description: AutoSupport on demand capable.

fields.name: autoSupportTransport
fields.description: AutoSupport transport.

fields.name: systemDomain
fields.description: The domain from which the autoSupport was sent

fields.name: isAsupRetransmitEnabled
fields.description: Indicates if AutoSupport retransmission is enabled.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Model of the system.

fields.name: modelRevision
fields.description: Revision of the system model, identifying a specific sub-version which can be used for ONTAP compatibility checks and end-of-support retrieval.

fields.name: endOfAvailability
fields.description: Platform end of availability

fields.name: endOfSupport
fields.description: Platform end of support

fields.name: hardwareCapabilities
fields.description: Maximum supported capacity and supported drive/shelf counts for this model.

type_EndOfSupport.name: EndOfSupport
type_EndOfSupport.description: End of support dates for the system

fields.name: earliestShelfEndOfSupportDate
fields.description: Earliest end-of-support date for any shelf in the system.

fields.name: earliestDiskEndOfSupportDate
fields.description: Earliest end-of-support date for any drive in the system.

fields.name: earliestEndOfSupportDate
fields.description: Earliest end of support date among hardwareModel.EndOfSupportDate, earliestShelfEndOfSupportDate and earliestDiskEndOfSupportDate.

fields.name: latestPVRDate
fields.description: Latest policy variance request date.

fields.name: latestEndOfSupportDate
fields.description: Latest date among earliestEndOfSupportDate and latestPVRDate.

fields.name: releaseDate
fields.description: Release date for the system

fields.name: endOfVersionFullSupport
fields.description: End of version full support for the system

fields.name: endOfVersionLimitedSupport
fields.description: End of version limited support for the system

fields.name: endOfSelfServiceSupport
fields.description: End of version self service support for the system

enum_SupportState.name: SupportState
enum_SupportState.description: Support state of the OS version.

enumValues.name: RECOMMENDED
enumValues.description: Indicates the OS version is provided with latest updates and recommended by NetApp.

enumValues.name: STANDARD
enumValues.description: Indicates the OS version is supported but may not have latest updates.

enumValues.name: WITHDRAWN
enumValues.description: Indicates the OS version is obsolete.

enum_SecurityFileType.name: SecurityFileType
enum_SecurityFileType.description: The type of the installable automatic update security file.

enumValues.name: ARPAI
enumValues.description: ARPAI is an abbreviation for Autonomous Ransomware Protection. It is an AI based model to proactively detect ransomware threats when this is set up in the system.

enum_ShelfFirmwareType.name: ShelfFirmwareType
enum_ShelfFirmwareType.description: The type of the shelf firmware.

enumValues.name: ACP_FIRMWARE
enumValues.description: Firmware for the Alternate Control Path module.

enum_SystemFileType.name: SystemFileType
enum_SystemFileType.description: The type of the installable automatic update system file.

enum_AutoUpdateStatus.name: AutoUpdateStatus
enum_AutoUpdateStatus.description: The current status of the automatic update file or firmware.

enum_AutoUpdatePriority.name: AutoUpdatePriority
enum_AutoUpdatePriority.description: The priority of the automatic update file or firmware.

enum_NetworkPortLinkStatus.name: NetworkPortLinkStatus
enum_NetworkPortLinkStatus.description: Link status of the network port.

enumValues.name: ALL
enumValues.description: All data is immediately marked as cold and tiered to object storage as soon as possible

enumValues.name: SNAPSHOT_ONLY
enumValues.description: Tiers cold Snapshot blocks in the volume that are not shared with the active file system

enumValues.name: AUTO
enumValues.description: ONTAP tiers all cold blocks in the volume to object storage

enumValues.name: NONE
enumValues.description: Preventing it from being moved to the cloud tier

enum_SnapLockMode.name: SnapLockMode
enum_SnapLockMode.description: SnapLock is a high-performance compliance solution for organizations that use WORM storage to retain files in unmodified form for regulatory and governance purposes.

enumValues.name: COMPLIANCE
enumValues.description: Compliance mode - Protection at the disk level. WORM files cannot be deleted during retention period.

enumValues.name: ENTERPRISE
enumValues.description: Enterprise mode - Protection at the file level. WORM files can be deleted by the compliance administrator using an audited "privileged delete" procedure.

enumValues.name: NON_SNAPLOCK
enumValues.description: Non-SnapLock - Volume is not configured with SnapLock protection.

enumValues.name: SEVEN_MODE
enumValues.description: An ONTAP system operating in a stand-alone, non-clustered configuration.

enumValues.name: CLUSTER_MODE
enumValues.description: An ONTAP system operating in a clustered configuration.

enumValues.name: SWITCH
enumValues.description: A storage switch sold and supported by NetApp.

contractRenewals._error: Field "contract" of type "System" must have a selection of subfields. Did you mean "contract { ... }"?

sustainabilityScore._error: Field "sustainabilityScore" of type "Query" must have a selection of subfields. Did you mean "sustainabilityScore { ... }"?

energyConsumption._error: Field "energyConsumptionMetrics" of type "Query" must have a selection of subfields. Did you mean "energyConsumptionMetrics { ... }"?

workloadSummary._error: Field "workloadSummary" of type "Query" must have a selection of subfields. Did you mean "workloadSummary { ... }"?

caseSummary._error: Field "caseSummary" of type "Query" must have a selection of subfields. Did you mean "caseSummary { ... }"?

ONTAPCapacity._error: Field "ONTAPSystemCapacity" of type "Query" must have a selection of subfields. Did you mean "ONTAPSystemCapacity { ... }"?
